title: Soak Test - No Headset connected, app in the foreground, phone idle
scenario: Soak test: App remains stable and usable after prolonged idle foreground use with no headset connected.
steps: Install and launch the app, go to the Home Screen (no headset connected).
Leave the phone idle with the app in the foreground.
After several hours (ideally overnight or multiple hours), check that the app is still running and usable.
expected: App remains running and usable with no memory leaks or crashes after prolonged idle time.
